name: Panda Go
short_description: This is a turn-based board puzzle game in which a variety of unexpected levels are combined through a simple guard mechanism! You need to skillfully operate your character to pass through guards and various obstacles to finally reach the end!
detailed_description:
Follow us

Discord: https://discord.gg/kxWrHZ5WDM


About the Game

1. The game focuses on hardcore, mind-bending puzzles. The first three chapters are relatively straightforward, serving as an entry point for players. 2. It's a turn-based board game where the only thing you can control is the panda's movement direction in each turn, defeating or avoiding guards and mechanisms. 3. Completing Side A will unlock Side B, which offers a higher level of difficulty (starting from 6B, it becomes extremely challenging). 4. There is no plot related content; it's a pure deduction or reasoning game where you can obtain complete information from the initial map.
about_the_game:
1. The game focuses on hardcore, mind-bending puzzles. The first three chapters are relatively straightforward, serving as an entry point for players.
2. It's a turn-based board game where the only thing you can control is the panda's movement direction in each turn, defeating or avoiding guards and mechanisms.
3. Completing Side A will unlock Side B, which offers a higher level of difficulty (starting from 6B, it becomes extremely challenging).
4. There is no plot related content; it's a pure deduction or reasoning game where you can obtain complete information from the initial map.
supported_languages:
Simplified Chinese*, English*, Japanese*, Traditional Chinese*, Korean*, French*, Italian*, German*, Spanish - Spain*, Russian*, Indonesian*, Polish*, Thai*, Portuguese - Portugal*, Vietnamese*, Arabic*, Hindi*
*languages with full audio support
